cost_proxy: 5 bps one-way ex-post turnover haircut: daily cost=sum(abs(w_t-w_{t-1}))*0.0005 subtracted from next-day portfolio return

data.source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway, no CSV

decision_rationale: Rejected: AR-036 missed the AR-015 falsifier. Its 5 bps costed random-window median Sharpe (0.48820084) is below AR-015 (0.52258623), worst random Sharpe (-0.7165961) is worse than AR-015 (-0.51612569), and main-window Sharpe/DD (1.11293094 / -0.11454658) are worse than AR-015 (1.13279897 / -0.09458803), despite materially lower turnover.

rejected_child_policy.divergent_child: ETF carry/term-structure defensive allocation using futures-proxy ETF carry and real-rate/macro regime inputs rather than price momentum/regime brakes.

warnings: qfa backtester has no native cost/slippage parameter; costs are post-qfa proxy.
Regime brake can miss rebounds and may simply lower exposure rather than add orthogonal alpha.
Model recursively recomputes smoothing from the available backtest window, so early-window warmup behavior affects random windows.
